sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the production business clearly and include a primary contact CTA.
Service summary must mention concrete offer areas such as tryck, efterbehandling, prepress or reproduktion when supported by the content.
Trust proof should focus on real signals such as provtryck, miljömärkt tryck, leveranstider or practical experience, without inventing certifications.
Gallery or testimonials may appear before trust-proof when content exists.
Sections should avoid repeating the same promise in multiple blocks.
Services intro must connect the company's production capability to customer needs such as upplagor, materialval, originalhantering or leverans.
Service list items must be concrete and specific, not generic labels only.
If pricing-overview is shown, it should present orienting information only unless real prices are available.
Portfolio intro must explain what kinds of jobs are shown and what they illustrate, such as material, finish or print quality.
Gallery items should represent real types of production and avoid exaggerated claims about scale or clients.
Contact CTA should invite a similar inquiry after the examples.
Contact info must include real contact channels available to the business.
If location or map is shown, it should match the stated address.
Contact CTA should support quote or production inquiries, not generic placeholder copy.
